layout: Two stacked Cards with titles + leading icons, each containing an info-style empty-state Alert.
card_style: Same as /status — white bg, 1px border, 4px radius, padding 16px, subtle shadow.

empty_state_alerts.title: No active alertmanagers
empty_state_alerts.note: Duplicate/near-duplicate text (pattern seen on /alerts and /rules too).

inconsistency_card_title_icon_usage: This page: titles HAVE icons. /status: titles HAVE icons. /tsdb-status: titles have NO icons. /flags, /config: no titles at all. This is inconsistent across pages.
